name: ddl-integration-tests
description: Create integration tests validating DDL generation against Teams domain schema
acceptanceCriteria: Tests use Teams domain schema from finding-ddl-test-schema (Organization, Team, Membership, App, Invitation)
Test: PostgreSQL dialect generates correct type mappings (UUID, TIMESTAMPTZ, BOOLEAN)
Test: SQLite dialect generates correct type fallbacks (TEXT, INTEGER)
Test: Primary keys inferred from x-mst-type: 'identifier'
Test: NOT NULL constraints applied based on required array
Test: Single references generate FK constraints with correct ON DELETE behavior
Test: Junction tables generated for array references
Test: Enum properties generate CHECK constraints
Test: Topological ordering ensures Team appears after Organization
Test: Computed properties (x-computed: true) are skipped
All must/should requirements covered by tests
